title: Jal Shey Advisor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Advisor''' was the second rank attainable in the [[Jal Shey]] monastic order and the equivalent of a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. They were typically assigned to the diplomatic missions and could be encountered throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}}
